text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day. Many students seem
nervous, but as for Curren Chan...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hello, Umastagram! It's me, Curren Chan! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I wanted to go live because I wanted to
take some pose requests from all of youuu!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Happy Valentine's Day! I know I can't give
everyone chocolates, so...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna give out some cute pics instead! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Entering for them is simple! I'll make a post after
this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's always dedicated to giving her fans
what they want. Just as I'm wondering if this is
going to go on all day...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro! It's Valentine's Day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! It's Valentine's Day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I followed a recipe and made some chocolates. ♪
Don't they just look perfect?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? ♪ I wonder who the lucky recipient
is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our eyes meet, and her gaze is deep with
meaning. I'm about to ask her who they're for,
but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I guess that's enough talk about Valentine's.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wanna get started with training? I'm looking
forward to our session. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, during break...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So, about those chocolates... I had my roommate,
Ayabe, try them first...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But she can be so mean! She told me they were
gross!
choice_data_list: ...Did she say what was wrong with them?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, I wanted a kind of edible flower theme...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So I added some chrysanthemum that came with
the sashimi.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Apparently, it wasn't very good.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then she told me not to use her as a guinea pig
anymore. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't worry. I made another batch after
that following the recipe to a tee.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Aaand that's all for our break! ♪ I'm gonna jog
back around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She brings up Valentine's a few more times
throughout the day, but she doesn't say who the
chocolates are for.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whew! I worked so hard today. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Guess that's all for today. See you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to ask who the chocolates are for, but
considering my position, I really can't bring it up.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm gonna go then. Byeee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, I head off campus to take care of
something.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe Valentine's Day is already over. I
had a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's exchange chocolates next year too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day's almost over. Just as I begin to bemoan
another uneventful Valentine's Day, I hear a
familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro!
choice_data_list: Curren? What are you doing here?
Curren? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis!
choice_data_list: Curren? What are you doing here?
Curren? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I was waiting for you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I was waiting for you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've still got some really important business to
take care of, after all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Here! Happy Valentine's Day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Here! Happy Valentine's Day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You look relieved.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You look relieved.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you were worried you weren't gonna
get any!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ha! I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It was so adorable seeing you so
worried! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It was so adorable seeing you so
worried! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I really poured my heart into making this
chocolate, so enjoy it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Curren Chan was playing with me like a
puppet all day long. This has certainly turned into
a Valentine's Day to remember.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...So, what do you think my important business is?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Curren Chan's smile, I get the impression
that she's under some kind of pressure...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You already know, don't you? Go on. Say it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You already know, don't you? Go on. Say it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Valentine's what?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hrm.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You really want me to say it, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I bet you don't even want them. That's why you're
being so quiet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I bet you don't even want them. That's why you're
being so quiet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I put my heart into these. I never cook, but I
picked out all the ingredients one by one...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All for one person and one person only...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Do you... really not want them?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You finally said it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pressure exuding from Curren Chan
disappears. I guess she just wanted me to beg her
for the chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then here, just for you—the chocolates I worked
so hard on.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then here, just for you—the chocolates I worked
so hard on.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Buuuut only if you tell me you want them another
hundred times! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You've teased me a whole bunch, so you can at
least do this for me, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You've teased me a whole bunch, so you can at
least do this for me, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I end up having to tell her I want them 101 times before she finally gives them to me. They're sweet. Very sweet... Way too sweet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Did I put too much sugar in it? I wanted
them to be just as sweet as my feelings for you, so
please don't be mad! ♪
